name: Recipefork Cookbook Assignment
description: Inline cookbook assignment block for Recipefork authoring flows with cookbook loading state, multi-select assignment, and inline new-cookbook creation.

inline-assignment.description: Authoring-side cookbook assignment section with skeleton loading, cookbook chips/cards, and inline create-new-cookbook controls that run before final redirect.

slots.loading-state: Skeleton or spinner state while cookbooks are fetched
slots.cookbook-list: Selectable cookbook rows with visibility and recipe counts
slots.new-cookbook: Inline title input and create/cancel controls for a new cookbook
slots.assignment-feedback: Success or partial-failure messaging when the recipe save succeeds but cookbook assignment fails

visual_brief: This should feel like a natural part of publishing or saving a recipe, not an afterthought modal. The loading state should be obvious, the selection affordances should be light, and the new-cookbook path should not derail the primary authoring flow.
